articles.title: Haaland's 'old-school' lesson for Liverpool as FA Cup record falls

articles.title: Rohl won't watch title rivals as Rangers enjoy top spot

articles.summary: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich came back from two goals down to clinch a victory over Freiburg thanks to Lennart Karl's 99th-minute winner.

articles.summary: Manager Liam Rosenior says there is "no ceiling" for Estevao after the Brazilian teenager's impressive performance in Chelsea's 7-0 victory against Port Vale.

articles.summary: Lauren Coughlin still leads at the Aramco Championship but Nelly Korda closed the gap on Saturday to just two shots as hilly Shadow Creek lived up to its reputation as a course on which pars are good ...
